name: Ryōshū | Blade of the House of Spiders
description:
"Isn't it only fair that you, Nursefathers, despair just as much as I have resented? Let us forget all. Erase all."

-Scenario 1: After Ryōshū has wrecked havoc within the House of Spiders and killed all the Nursefathers, the Fingers want to seize what remains. The Index mobilizes its forces to secure the area, you get caught in the cross fire and end up helping her escape.

-Scenario 2: You are a Nursefather and she's coming after you.
